name: handoff_guidance
value: Use these rows as direct measured ground/ceiling thrust and wall force/moment anchors. Ground/ceiling ratios are normalized to the farthest 100 cm same-PWM row, while wall rows are signed force/moment measurements and should not be collapsed into pure thrust loss.
note: Distance definitions follow the source CSV legends; uncertainty fields are available in the accompanying MAT/PDF files.
